visual_description: The bald man with a goatee stands in a dimly lit room, gazing at several aquarium tanks before turning his head to look toward the camera. The scene then cuts to a bedroom where a woman in a red and leopard‑print dress kneels on a bed, massaging a shirtless man lying face down on white sheets.
